heading: Notification Options
body:
When you configure an alert, you select how notifications are
sent. You can select multiple notification methods, such as
email, text message, or team collaboration tools.

To use certain notification methods, you must first set up
notification methods in the project's settings.
If the notification method's value becomes invalid, Atlas
sends an email to the project owner. The following
notification methods require set up in the project's
settings:

- Atlas Project

- Atlas Organization

- Atlas User

- Email

- SMS

- PagerDuty

- Datadog

- VictorOps

- Opsgenie

- Microsoft Teams

- Webhook

- Datadog

- VictorOps

- Opsgenie

- Microsoft Teams

- Webhook

When you configure an alert, you select how notifications are
sent. You can select multiple notification methods, such as
email, text message, or team collaboration tools.

Atlas supports Slack as a notification method. From the
organization's Settings menu, click
Add to Slack in Slack Settings and
log in to your preferred Slack workspace.

Atlas supports configuring all of the following
notification methods during alert configuration:

- Atlas Organization

- Atlas User

- Email

- SMS

- PagerDuty

- Datadog

- VictorOps

- Opsgenie

- Microsoft Teams
